name: Constitutional Law
description: The supreme law of India — Articles, Parts, Schedules, Fundamental Rights, Directive Principles, and constitutional doctrines.

name: Criminal Law (Substantive)
description: Offences and punishments — Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita (BNS), formerly Indian Penal Code (IPC).

name: Criminal Procedure
description: Procedure for criminal cases — Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita (BNSS), formerly Code of Criminal Procedure (CrPC).

name: Civil Law
description: Law of Contracts, Torts, Property, and related civil matters.

name: Family & Personal Law
description: Hindu Law, Muslim Personal Law, Christian Law, Special Marriage Act, and related personal matters.

name: Law of Evidence
description: Bharatiya Sakshya Adhiniyam (BSA), formerly Indian Evidence Act — rules governing proof in court.

name: Civil Procedure
description: Code of Civil Procedure (CPC) — procedure for civil cases, suits, appeals, and execution.

name: Administrative Law
description: Government accountability, judicial review of administrative action, natural justice, and delegated legislation.

name: Commercial & Corporate Law
description: Companies Act, Banking Law, Insurance Law, Intellectual Property, and commercial transactions.

name: Labour & Industrial Law
description: Labour codes, industrial disputes, social security, wages, and workplace regulation.

name: Environmental Law
description: Environmental protection, pollution control, wildlife, and sustainability laws.

name: Cyber Law & IT
description: Information Technology Act, data protection, digital privacy, and cyber crimes.

name: Tax Law
description: Income Tax, GST, customs, and fiscal legislation.

name: International Law
description: Public International Law, treaties, private international law, and conflict of laws.

name: Jurisprudence & Legal Theory
description: Schools of legal thought, philosophy of law, legal reasoning, and interpretation.
